question.english: Can you describe your home to me? What does it look like, and which room is your absolute favorite? Please give me a detailed description of your home.
question.korean: 당신이 사는 집에 대해 설명해 주시겠어요? 집이 어떻게 생겼고, 가장 좋아하는 방은 어디인가요? 집의 모습을 자세하게 설명해 주세요.
question.combo_context: 집에 관한 3연속 콤보 질문 중 첫 번째 문항으로, 현재 거주하는 집의 전반적인 구조와 가장 애정하는 공간을 상세히 묘사하는 대표적인 표준 질문입니다.

model_answer.script:
Well, to answer your question, I currently live in a medium-sized apartment with my family. Overall, it has a modern open-concept layout, which makes the entire place feel surprisingly spacious and airy.

If I had to pick my absolute favorite spot, it would definitely be my living room. You know, the highlight of this room is the floor-to-ceiling windows that let in ample natural light all day long. Honestly, walking into the room bathed in soft sunlight every morning instantly brightens up my mood. Right in the middle, I placed a soft velvet sofa that serves as a focal point, which really helps to create a warm ambiance.

Also, because I frequently work from home, I set up a dedicated workstation in one corner. By carefully picking low-profile furniture, I was able to maximize space efficiency without making the room feel cramped.

Looking back, when I first moved in, the apartment was completely bare. But taking the time to turn it into a space that feels cozy and inviting has been immensely satisfying. All in all, my home isn't just a physical space; it's my personal sanctuary where I can fully reset.
model_answer.structure_note: 서론: 거주 형태 및 아파트 전체 구조(open-concept layout) 소개 → MP: 가장 좋아하는 공간인 거실 소개 → 디테일 1: 통유리창(floor-to-ceiling windows), 채광, 분위기를 잡는 가구배치 → 디테일 2: 재택근무 공간 조성을 통한 공간 활용(maximize space efficiency) 극대화 → 감정/생각: 빈 집을 꾸미며 느낀 큰 만족감 → 마무리: 단순한 집을 넘어 정서적 안식처라는 최종 의미 부여
al_points: 감각적이고 구체적인 공간 묘사 어휘: 'floor-to-ceiling windows', 'bathed in soft sunlight', 'focal point' 등 시각적 이미지를 선명하게 전달하는 고급 어휘 표현을 자유롭게 구사했습니다.
자연스러운 구어체 디스코스 마커 사용: 'You know', 'Honestly', 'Looking back', 'All in all'과 같은 연결어를 적재적소에 배치하여 답변의 흐름을 대화하듯 부드럽게 이끌었습니다.
시제 및 상황 대비(Past vs. Present): 과거 처음 이사 왔을 때의 상태(completely bare)와 현재 직접 정성스레 꾸민 상태(feels cozy and inviting)를 대조하여 세련된 서사 구조를 완성했습니다.

vocab.example: Turning it into a space that feels cozy and inviting has been immensely satisfying.
vocab.collocation: feel cozy and inviting to guests

vocab.example: The highlight of this room is the floor-to-ceiling windows that let in sunlight.
The living room receives ample natural light throughout the day.
The soft lighting helps to create a warm ambiance in the living room.
vocab.collocation: create a warm ambiance with lighting

vocab.example: I placed a soft velvet sofa that serves as a focal point in the room.
vocab.collocation: serve as a main focal point

vocab.example: By picking low-profile furniture, I was able to maximize space efficiency.
vocab.collocation: maximize space efficiency in small rooms

vocab.example: When I was a student, I used to live in a fully furnished apartment near campus.
vocab.collocation: move into a fully furnished apartment

vocab.example: Overall, my home has a modern open-concept layout.
My friend's new apartment is very tastefully decorated with modern art pieces.
I transformed my spare room into a multi-functional space for work and relaxation.
The warm yellow lights and soft rugs exude a cozy vibe throughout the room.
The balcony room features wall-to-wall windows that offer a great city view.
My balcony gets plenty of sunlight, so my house plants grow really well.
Adding scented candles helps craft a welcoming mood for visitors.
The kitchen island serves as a versatile area for dining and quick meetings.

vocab_quiz.question: 다음 중 '공간 활용도를 극대화하다'라는 의미를 가진 표현은 무엇일까요?
다음 중 '바닥부터 천장까지 이어진 통유리창'을 뜻하는 어휘는 무엇일까요?
다음 중 'tastefully decorated'의 한국어 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것은 무엇일까요?

빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 단어를 고르세요.
'The highlight of this room is the windows that let in ____ natural light all day long.'

빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 단어를 고르세요.
'I placed a soft velvet sofa in the center that serves as a ____ point for the entire room.'
스크립트의 'create a warm ambiance' 대신 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 유사한 표현은 무엇일까요?
스크립트의 'ample natural light' 표현을 대신하여 유의어로 사용할 수 있는 단어는 무엇일까요?

patterns.pattern: If I had to pick my absolute favorite [noun], it would definitely be...
patterns.meaning: 제가 가장 좋아하는 [명사]를 단 하나 골라야 한다면, 단연 ~일 것입니다.
patterns.usage_today: If I had to pick my absolute favorite spot, it would definitely be my living room.
patterns.extra_example: If I had to pick my absolute favorite dish, it would definitely be my mother's home-cooked pasta.

patterns.pattern: Taking the time to [verb] has been immensely satisfying.
patterns.meaning: 시간과 노력을 들여 ~한 것은 매우 만족스러운 경험이었습니다.
patterns.usage_today: But taking the time to turn it into a space that feels cozy and inviting has been immensely satisfying.
patterns.extra_example: Taking the time to organize my daily schedule and workspace has been immensely satisfying.

review_words.new_example: My family decided to embark on a complete renovation of our living room last month.
When I was moving into my new apartment, the main elevator was temporarily out of service.
Our interior decorating plans came to a screeching halt due to unexpected delivery delays.
To make matters worse, the rainy weather prevented us from painting the living room walls.

review_patterns.new_example: Everything was perfect until the air conditioner in the living room suddenly stopped working.
review_patterns.mini_mission: 이 패턴과 오늘 배운 단어 'ample natural light'를 함께 써서 한 문장 말해보기: Everything was perfect until the huge tree outside blocked all the ample natural light coming into my room.

checklist: 오늘 핵심/확장 단어를 4개 이상 활용하여 말했는가?
과거 이사 당시와 현재의 상황을 말할 때 과거 시제를 정확히 유지했는가?
메인 포인트(거실) 후 채광, 가구, 공간 활용 등 디테일을 2개 이상 확장했는가?
집을 직접 꾸미며 느낀 만족감과 안식처로서의 개인적 감정/생각을 표현했는가?
마지막에 'All in all...'로 답변을 완벽히 정리하는 마무리 문장을 구성했는가?
필러(You know, Honestly 등)를 활용하여 3초 이상의 불필요한 침묵 없이 연설했는가?
